items.author: Brad Rowland
items.body_excerpt:
pretty wild summer league opener

hawks fall short in overtime

14 points, 9 assists, 4 steals, 1 turnover for kingston flemings in his debut

ATL won the possession game by a lot but ended up shooting 32% from the field and 20% from three

locked on hawks to come

items.title: For the rest of his life, that keeper can be like, "Yeah, Mbappe got me on a penalty, but I got him twice in open play." Which isn't the same as winning, but it's better than nothing.
items.author: Dan Devine
items.body_excerpt: For the rest of his life, that keeper can be like, "Yeah, Mbappe got me on a penalty, but I got him twice in open play." Which isn't the same as winning, but it's better than nothing.

images.alt: Screenshot of a Bluesky thread reacting to Summer League overtime. Hoop Informatics posts "The three greatest words in sports / Summer League Overtime." Replies include Mark C joking about overtime in the Salt Lake City summer league game, Jazz Man Mark spelling out "OVERTIME. SUMMER. LEAGUE. BASKETBALL." and calling it peak "Sicko" behavior with a link to sickoscommittee.org, and John Hollinger simply exclaiming "SUMMER LEAGUE OVERTIME!"
